prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-THERMALTARP-GRN Product Type: TARP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Double Sided Thick Thermal Blanket 60 x 82 Inch Description: If any kind of outdoor camping, backpacking, trekking or hiking are on the top of your activity list, the ASR Outdoor Waterproof Thermal Reflective Camping Tent Tarp Blanket Survival Kit is an essential item in your travel backpack, first aid kit, camping gear or bug out bag in case of emergency.

It's unique design and fabrication make this survival tent, tarp or blanket versatile and multipurpose. Depending on your emergency or survival situation, the tarp or tent can be constructed into many different types of shelters to keep you safe from the elements: A-frame, blanket, diamond fly, fold over wind shed, sunshade or shade sail.

The shelter survival tent kit includes:

- Thermal reflective, waterproof with rip-stop poly seams
- Reinforced grommets with aluminum coating
- Four (4) 70" paracord ropes
- Four (4) metal pegs for tent anchoring
- Convenient compact case for travel or storage

It's important to note the survival tent or tarp's material or fabric. Measuring 60 inches by 82 inches, the fabrication is extra-thick, waterproof, thermal reflective and double-sided; the aluminized-laminate fiber scrim is incredibly durable due to the way the material crosses or weaves together during production, making it an incredible survival tool have that is both wear-and-tear resistant and weatherproof.

The waterproof thermal reflective backpacking tent is a great addition to your camping gear or camping accessories in case you need an extra pop up shelter or emergency blanket. Packing up in a convenient and compact travel or storage case, the tent tools or camping accessories that come with the survival shelter kit are handy to have on site (grommets, paracord, tent stakes), in case you need to make a last-minute repair or temporary fix when you're already out in the wilderness with limited resources or tools at your disposal Search Terms: camping blanket thermal shelter camp ground cover mat for sleeping aluminized reinforced mylar hunting blankets backpacking makeshift tent emergency outdoors beach sun pop up logic outdoor cat canopy take ice fishing accessories tents gear mattress Features: - TENT OR TARP SURVIVAL KIT: This unique shelter survival kit is not only waterproof and thermal reflective, it can be constructed into many different types of shelters: A-frame, blanket, diamond fly, fold over wind shed, sunshade or shade sail to keep you safe during an emergency or survival situation - TENT TOOLS OR ACCESSORIES: The tent or tarp survival kit includes reinforced grommets with aluminum coating, rip stop poly seams, four 70" paracord ropes and four metal pegs that anchor at the corners; these tools come with the survival kit but are also convenient to include with your other camping accessories or travel gear in case a repair or temporary fix is needed - WATERPROOF FABRIC: Measuring 60 by 82 inches and extra thick in its design, the ASR Outdoor survival tent, tarp or blanket is also double sided and completely waterproof; aluminized-laminate fiber scrim fabrication is incredibly durable and weather resistant, keeping you safe from outdoor elements - STORAGE CASE FOR TRAVEL: The tent, tarp or blanket shelter survival kit comes with a storage case so you can take it with you on camping, hiking, backpacking, climbing, trekking or snowboarding expeditions; the survival tarp is also great to have in your bug out bag, travel backpack or first aid kit - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 10.2lbs; Dimensions: 60 x 82 inches; Kit includes: tarp, 4 70 inch paracord ropes, 4 tent pegs, 4 strap grommets, carrying pouch; Color: olive green === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 60 x 82 Inch Olive Green Thermal Tarp

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 60 x 82 in Olive Green Thermal Blanket

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof, Double-Sided, Thermal Reflective, Includes Paracord Ropes And Metal Pegs, Emergency Shelter Kit

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof Thermal Reflective, Reinforced Grommets, Paracord Ropes, Tent Stakes, Compact Storage Pouch
